Partner Network

Your skills. Our platform.
Enterprise projects.

Nuvextro partners with highly skilled independent professionals to deliver enterprise-grade technology projects. You bring the expertise — we provide the enterprise infrastructure to execute at scale.

The Model

How partnering with Nuvextro works

Partner-sourced projects (you bring the lead)

01 You identify an enterprise opportunity
02 Nuvextro signs the contract with the client
03 You deliver the technical solution
04 Nuvextro manages project governance and admin
05 Revenue split: You keep 80%, Nuvextro takes 20%
Revenue split
80% to partner

Nuvextro-sourced projects (we bring the client)

01 Nuvextro acquires the client directly
02 Solution architecture is defined collaboratively
03 Partner engineers assist with project delivery
04 Nuvextro leads client relationship and governance
05 Revenue split: Partner earns 60–70% of project revenue
Revenue split
60–70% to partner
Why Join

What you get as a Nuvextro partner

Enterprise access

Work on enterprise-level projects you wouldn't be able to access independently.

No admin overhead

We handle contracts, procurement, invoicing, and client communication.

Legal protection

Work under Nuvextro's legal entity with full contractual protection.

80% revenue share

On partner-sourced projects, you keep 80% of the project revenue.

Professional governance

Project management and governance provided — you focus on delivery.

Portfolio building

Your work is showcased through Nuvextro's growing project portfolio.

Partner Profiles

Who we're looking for

We partner with certified, experienced professionals across infrastructure and cloud disciplines.

VMware Specialists

vSphere, vSAN, NSX-T certified engineers for virtualization projects.

Cloud Architects

AWS, Azure, GCP certified professionals for cloud deployments and migrations.

Kubernetes Engineers

Platform engineers with container orchestration and GitOps expertise.

Security Specialists

Cybersecurity professionals with CISSP, CISM, or equivalent certifications.

Network Engineers

CCIE/CCNP-level engineers for enterprise network design and deployment.

DevOps & Automation

Infrastructure automation, CI/CD, and IaC specialists (Terraform, Ansible).

Get Started

Partner inquiry

Tell us about your expertise and we'll be in touch to discuss how we can work together.
